name: quantum-safe-sdk
description: Quantum Safe Encryption SDK for Node.js

scripts.test: node -e "const pqc = require('./index'); const kp = pqc.generateKeypair(); const ct = pqc.encryptBit(1, kp.pub); if(pqc.decryptBit(ct, kp.sec) !== 1) throw new Error('Decryption failed'); console.log('Test passed!');"
